story.title: Dead Zone: Escape
story.intro: The outbreak started three months ago. The military tried to contain it, but they failed. Now the cities are overrun, and survival means staying one step ahead of the horde.

cutsceneBefore.text: For months, you've been hiding in your house, surviving on whatever you could find.
The battles between the military and the infected are over. The screams have stopped. Only silence remains.
Your supplies are nearly gone. It's time to leave. Search your home one last time before heading out.

cutsceneAfter.text: With your bag packed, you take one last look at your home. Time to go.

encounter.description: A zombie dog spots you! You need to fight or distract it.
encounter.failReason: Without a weapon, you couldn't defend yourself. The zombie dog overwhelmed you.

cutsceneBefore.text: The streets are eerily quiet. Abandoned cars line the road. Something moves in the shadows...

encounter.description: You stumble and drop your backpack while running! Search for your scattered supplies.
encounter.failReason: You couldn't find enough supplies to continue.

cutsceneBefore.text: Escaping through the woods seemed like a good idea... until you heard them following.
Running blindly, you trip and your bag goes flying. Your supplies scatter everywhere!
In the distance, you spot an old mansion through the trees. It might have supplies.
As you approach, the house looms larger. It looks abandoned... but appearances can be deceiving.
You need shelter for the night. This will have to do. Search quickly before dark.

encounter.description: You hear scratching from behind a locked door. Something is trapped down here with you!
encounter.failReason: You didn't have enough weapons to fight off what was in the basement.

cutsceneBefore.text: There must be supplies in the basement. You descend into the darkness...
The upstairs bedrooms might have medical supplies and food. Be thorough.

cutsceneAfter.text: With the house cleared, you prepare to move on. The city center might have a safe zone.

encounter.description: A horde blocks the main road! You need to find another way through.
encounter.failReason: Without enough supplies to create a distraction, the horde caught up to you.

cutsceneBefore.text: The city streets are a maze of burned cars and debris. Every shadow could hide danger.
The school cafeteria might have food. The nurse's office might have medical supplies.
Search carefully. You're getting closer to the safe zone.

encounter.description: Infected patients roam the halls. You'll need everything you have to get through.
encounter.failReason: The hospital was overrun. Without proper weapons and supplies, you couldn't make it through.

cutsceneBefore.text: I see a hospital in the distance. The military used it as a staging area. There should be supplies...
As you get closer, you see the devastation. Bodies everywhere. This won't be easy.
Inside the hospital entrance. The infected are here... this is the most dangerous place yet.

encounter.description: The safe zone gate is just ahead! Make one final push!
encounter.failReason: You collapsed from exhaustion just steps from safety. So close...

cutsceneBefore.text: You can see the walls of the safe zone ahead. Soldiers patrol the perimeter.
One last search for supplies, then freedom awaits!

text: Congratulations! You made it to the safe zone!
After months of survival, you finally found safety.
The military welcomes you in. Your journey is over... for now.
Your journey has come to an end.
In this world, one wrong move means death.
But perhaps another survivor will succeed where you failed...
The infection spreads through your body...
